core_principles: Authority & Clarity: The dashboard must instantly communicate trust and stability to Owners and Managers.
Density & Precision: Use a 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. Tight gaps, exact alignments, no wasted space.
Professional but Modern: Avoid generic SaaS looks. Use structural borders, high-contrast typography, and purposeful negative space.
anti_patterns: No drop-shadow overuse. Rely on 1px solid borders for separation.
No generic Inter font for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for an authoritative corporate edge.
No center-aligned forms or tables. Everything must follow strict left-aligned or grid-aligned reading patterns.

mono.usage: Time, Employee IDs, Dates, GPS Coordinates

scale.metric: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-slate-900 font-headings

components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
components.stat_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden
components.button: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2
components.input: w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-sm placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all
components.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

table.wrapper: w-full overflow-x-auto border border-slate-200 rounded-xl bg-white
table.th: px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider
table.td: px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-slate-700 border-b border-slate-100

components.camera_panel: relative w-full aspect-video bg-slate-900 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-center

icons.usage: Use 'ph' and 'ph-fill' classes. e.g.,
icons.style: Regular for UI elements, Fill for active navigation/states.

image_urls.description: Modern office interior with architectural design.
image_urls.usage_instructions: Use as a split-screen cover image for the Authentication/Login screen to establish a corporate, formal mood.

image_urls.description: Professional corporate portrait of a man.
image_urls.usage_instructions: Use as the placeholder avatar for the Manager/Owner profile in the topbar or employee lists.

technical_requirements.framework: Vanilla HTML + Tailwind CSS Play CDN + Vanilla JS
technical_requirements.architecture: Single index.html acting as a shell. Sidebar and topbar are static. Main content area (#app-content) swaps dynamically using Vanilla JS module fetching.
technical_requirements.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='clock-in-btn').
technical_requirements.tailwind_config: Include standard custom fonts and colors via the Tailwind Play CDN <script> configuration block.
